translation.en: I want to cook this dish.

exampleSentencesTranslated: She usually cook dinner for the whole family every evening.
I want to learn how to cook traditional Vietnamese pho.
He really likes to cook with friends on weekends.

example.es: Voy a cocinar arroz para la cena.
example.vi: Tôi sẽ nấu cơm cho bữa tối.
example.en: I will cook rice for dinner.

definitions.vi: Chuẩn bị thức ăn bằng cách đun nóng.
definitions.en: To prepare food by heating it.

notes:
nấu = to cook (prepare food with heat). It’s used for cooking by boiling, frying, steaming, etc.

Use it with food or dishes: nấu cơm, nấu canh, nấu món gì đó. You can also say nấu ăn = to cook in general.

Strong memory link: nấu (cook with heat) vs làm (make, more general).
exampleSentences: Chị thường nấu bữa tối cho cả gia đình vào mỗi tối.
Em muốn học cách nấu món phở truyền thống của Việt Nam.
Anh ấy rất thích nấu ăn cùng bạn bè vào cuối tuần.

content.sentence: Tôi thích ___ bữa tối mỗi ngày.

translation.en: I like to cook dinner every day.

notes_md:
**nấu** = to cook (prepare food with heat). It’s used for cooking by boiling, frying, steaming, etc.

Use it with food or dishes: *nấu cơm, nấu canh, nấu món gì đó*. You can also say **nấu ăn** = to cook in general.


Strong memory link: **nấu** (cook with heat) vs **làm** (make, more general).
